chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-554 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. 21.08.2025 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G a/w Imtiaz Ahmed Jagirani, Additional Controller Exams, SPSC Hyderabad. -.-.-.-.- At the very outset learned Addl. A. G, places on record copy of admit card issued by the Additional Controller of Examinations, Sindh Public Service Commission, Hyderabad (respondents) in favour of the petitioner and others. He further submits that the purpose of directions issued in earlier orders have been served, therefore, seeks disposal of the petition. Mr. Abro counsel for the petitioner when confronted with above factum, admits and affirms the position; hence seeks disposal of the petition. Order accordingly. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
